description_long: This lounge area features a modern, open-plan design with a black marble floor and a large, light gray area rug defining the seating zone. Four brown, boxy armchairs with plush cushions are arranged around two rectangular, black marble coffee tables with white veining. The walls are finished in a light marble texture, and the space is partially enclosed by a thick, black-framed border along the top. A sleek, white marble reception desk sits near the entrance, and a small, black side table is positioned in the corner. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and luxurious, with a focus on clean lines and high-contrast materials.
description: A modern lounge with brown cushioned armchairs, black marble tables, and a marble-finished floor and walls, arranged in a spacious, open layout.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lounge from an angled front perspective, highlighting the seating arrangement, marble coffee tables, and the reception desk near the entrance.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, clearly displaying the symmetrical arrangement of armchairs and tables, as well as the open, inviting layout.
description_view_2: View 2 shows the lounge from the back, with the marble wall dominating the view and only the tops of the furniture barely visible.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side/rear view, mostly showing the marble wall and the black frame, with minimal visibility of the interior furnishings.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each armchair has a single seat cushion and a single back cushion, both attached and plush, with no visible loose cushions or sectional arrangements.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrests are straight, medium-height, and rectangular, matching the armchair's boxy silhouette with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, thick, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a continuous boxy frame.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visibly exposed, suggesting a low-profile or concealed base typical of modern lounge chairs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid brown with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
